fato_historico: 1994: Rwandan genocide: The Rwandan Patriotic Front takes control of Gisenyi and north western Rwanda, forcing the interim government into Zaire and ending the genocide.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a powerful shift as shadows dissipate, making room for a fresh start. Just as the horizon clears after long storms, you may find your inner strength rekindled. It is a good time to release past burdens and step boldly toward a brighter, more harmonious future filled with potential and heartfelt peace.
frase_do_dia: The sun rises to reveal beauty after the longest night.
significado_numero: A powerful cycle representing humanitarian efforts and the dawn of peace.
conselho: Embrace the light and let your spirit lead the way toward positive transformation.
